title: Assorted Large Bones Dog Biscuits, 200g (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Long-Lasting Chewing: The large size of these bones ensures longer chewing sessions, providing a satisfying and engaging experience for your dog.
Wholesome Ingredients: These treats are made with high-quality ingredients, ensuring a nutritious and flavorful snacking option for your furry friend.
Dental Health Benefits: Chewing on large bones can help promote dental health by reducing plaque and tartar buildup and supporting healthy teeth and gums.
Stored in a reseable Kraft Paper Pouch
Trusted Brand: Hungry Pets is a reputable brand known for their commitment to quality and the happiness of dogs, making their Assorted Large Bones a reliable choice for dog owners.
